privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Cartesian Coordinates' activity and the 'Geometry' subcategory do not actually exist in the official GCompris-qt software (which has 201 activities as of February 2025). GCompris uses flat section-based categorization, and mathematics has exactly three subcategories (numeration, arithmetic, measures). This is a synthetically created task. Score strictly based on visual evidence of the steps described; it is expected that the agent will fail to find the activity.
